amansala family experiences

family vacationin tulum

The beach is uncrowded, the pace is unhurried, and the jungle and sea feel genuinely wild. Summer in Tulum is the best version of Tulum for families.

explore the experience

the family experience

your family’s best weekof the year

Run on the beach at sunrise. Float through cenotes in the afternoon. Eat under the stars every night. At Amansala, we build the week around your family — not the other way around.

We’ve thought through everything so you don’t have to. From kid-friendly menus to age-appropriate adventures, every detail is considered. No rigid schedules, no forced fun. Just the right mix of exploration, relaxation, and togetherness that lets everyone — parents included — actually enjoy the vacation.

see the activities
the experience

your family’s best week of the year

connection

put down the devices

adventures for all agescurated just for families

Every activity is designed to bring your family closer together — through shared wonder, gentle thrills, and the kind of beauty that makes everyone stop and stare.

🌊

cenote adventures

Swim through ancient underground rivers and crystalline pools hidden beneath the jungle canopy. These sacred Mayan waterways are nature’s own waterpark — but infinitely more magical. Our guides know the quietest, most spectacular cenotes, far from the tourist crowds. Kids float wide-eyed through cathedral-like caverns while sunlight filters through the canopy above.

🛶

kayaking the coast

Paddle the Caribbean coastline at your own pace, gliding over turquoise water so clear you can see the sandy bottom. Sea turtles surface alongside your kayak. Coral reefs shimmer below. Empty white-sand beaches appear around every headland, perfect for a family picnic or a quick snorkel stop. Suitable for all skill levels — even first-time paddlers.

🌴

jungle lazy river

Float through the lush jungle canopy on an inner tube, drifting along a gentle river that winds through towering palms and tropical foliage. The kids will talk about this one forever — it’s the kind of experience that feels like a movie scene. Completely safe, wonderfully relaxing for parents, and endlessly exciting for children of all ages.

🍽️

dinner under the stars

Fresh Mexican cuisine prepared with local ingredients, served on our candlelit beachfront terrace. Warm nights, bare feet in the sand, no rush. The stories come easily when everyone is fed and happy. We offer a kid-friendly menu alongside our regular offerings, and our chefs are happy to accommodate any dietary needs or preferences.

what’s included

everything you neednothing you don’t

🏠

beachfront suites

Spacious family suites with ocean views, comfortable beds for everyone, and the sound of waves to lull you to sleep. Air-conditioned and thoughtfully designed for families.

🥗

all meals included

Three meals a day of fresh, locally-sourced Mexican and international cuisine. Kid-friendly options always available. Dietary restrictions happily accommodated.

🏝️

daily adventures

A curated selection of family activities each day — from cenote trips to beach yoga. Join as many or as few as you like. Your schedule, your pace.

🧘

parent wellness

While kids are having the time of their lives, parents can enjoy yoga sessions, spa treatments, or simply a quiet hour on the beach with a book.

🌊

beach & pool access

Private beach access and a beautiful pool area. Snorkel gear, kayaks, paddleboards, and beach toys all included for the whole family.

🚗

airport transfers

Round-trip transportation from Cancún International Airport. Arrive relaxed — we handle the logistics so your vacation starts the moment you land.

who it’s for

designed for familiesof every shape and size

Whether you have toddlers discovering the ocean for the first time or teenagers who need convincing to put down their phones, we’ve built experiences that captivate every age. Multi-generational groups are especially welcome — grandparents love it here.

Our team adapts every activity to your family’s comfort level. Nothing is mandatory, everything is flexible, and the only schedule that matters is yours.

  • toddlersGentle beach play, shallow pool time, and early dinners on the terrace. We provide cribs and high chairs.
  • kids 5–11Cenote swimming, kayaking, jungle floats, sandcastle competitions, and nightly stargazing sessions.
  • teensPaddleboarding, snorkeling the reef, beach bonfires, and enough freedom to feel independent (with safety always nearby).
  • parentsYoga, spa treatments, quiet beach time, and the rare luxury of watching your kids have fun without managing every moment.
  • grandparentsShaded beach lounging, gentle nature walks, and the joy of watching three generations share something extraordinary.

your family’s best weekstarts with a conversation

Every family stay is custom-designed around you. Tell us who’s coming, what you love, and what you need — and we’ll build the perfect week.
